metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage Terms and Glossary
metadata.description: Quick glossary for Bizarre Lineage terms including prestige, raids, awakening, stand arrows, fighting styles, and sub-abilities.

metadata.title: Awakening in Bizarre Lineage
metadata.description: What awakening means in Bizarre Lineage, why it is a late-game term, and how it connects to prestige and evolution routes.

metadata.title: Fighting Styles in Bizarre Lineage
metadata.description: What fighting styles are in Bizarre Lineage, how to unlock them, and where Boxing, Kendo, and Karate trainers are located.

metadata.title: Prestige in Bizarre Lineage
metadata.description: What prestige means in Bizarre Lineage, where to prestige, and why timing matters more than pressing it immediately.

metadata.title: Raid in Bizarre Lineage
metadata.description: Bizarre Lineage raid overview covering the 8-player raid format, raid token shops, and every listed raid reward in the current public game data.

metadata.title: Stand Arrow in Bizarre Lineage
metadata.description: What a Stand Arrow is in Bizarre Lineage, how to get one, and why it matters for your first stand route.

metadata.title: Sub-Abilities in Bizarre Lineage
metadata.description: What sub-abilities are in Bizarre Lineage, how to unlock them, and how trainer routes differ from the Vampire item route.
